name: SCC_CreatePowerDeliveryResDC_ISO
title: SCC_CreatePowerDeliveryResDC_ISO
syntax: long SCC_CreatePowerDeliveryResDC_ISO ( byte SessionID[], char ResponseCode[], long NotificationMaxDelay, char StatusCode[], char Notification[] )
description: Creates a Power Delivery Response message for sending, using the DC syntax.

parameters.name: SessionID
parameters.description: 8-byte long SessionID of SCC connection, range: 0 - 0xFF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF.
